questions.question: How do you apply Introduction to Touch Typing in a real project?
questions.answer: In practice, Introduction to Touch Typing is applied by following established patterns and best practices. Start with the simplest implementation, test thoroughly, and iterate. The key is to understand the underlying principles so you can adapt to different scenarios.

questions.question: What are common mistakes when working with Introduction to Touch Typing?
questions.answer: Common mistakes include: not understanding the fundamentals before applying advanced patterns, ignoring edge cases, not testing adequately, and over-engineering solutions. The best approach is to start simple and add complexity only when needed.
